SEARCH
Package view.window

Interface VisualizerInterface

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractVisualizer, CompareWindow, VisualizerWindow
public interface VisualizerInterface
Defines the basic actions that every sorting visualizer must support. Any class that implements this interface can generate data, start, pause, and reset sorting.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    generateData()
    Generates a new set of data to be sorted and displays it on the visualizer.
    void
    reset()
    Stops the sorting and resets the visualizer back to its initial state.
    void
    startSorting()
    Starts the sorting algorithm on the current data.
    void
    togglePause()
    Pauses the sorting if it is running, or resumes it if it is already paused.

  • Method Details

    • generateData

      void generateData()
      Generates a new set of data to be sorted and displays it on the visualizer.

    • startSorting

      void startSorting()
      Starts the sorting algorithm on the current data.

    • togglePause

      void togglePause()
      Pauses the sorting if it is running, or resumes it if it is already paused.

    • reset

      void reset()
      Stops the sorting and resets the visualizer back to its initial state.
